slack_one_liner: `checkout` service experiencing high latency (p99 2199ms) due to `payment` service errors (2.61% error rate) for gold-tier users with "Invalid token".
github_body:
### Issue Summary

The `checkout` service is experiencing a critical latency spike (p99 2199ms) and an elevated error rate (2.62%). Investigation reveals that the root cause is failures in the `payment` service when processing requests from gold-tier loyalty users.

### Evidence

| Metric | Value |
|---|---|
| Alerting Service | `checkout` |
| Affected Service p99 Latency | 2199.08 ms |
| Root Cause Service | `payment` |
| Root Cause Error Rate | 2.61% |
| Affected User Pattern | `gold-tier loyalty users` |

### Error Message

```
Payment request failed. Invalid token. demo.user_context.loyalty_level=gold
```

### Recommended Fix Steps

- [ ] Investigate `payment` service logs for more details on "Invalid token" errors, specifically for `loyalty_level=gold` users.
- [ ] Check the payment gateway integration for `gold-tier` users to ensure correct token handling.
- [ ] Verify if there were recent deployments or configuration changes to the `payment` service that could affect token validation for specific user tiers.

### SigNoz Links

- [Checkout Service Dashboard](http://signoz-signoz-0:8080/services/checkout)
- [Payment Service Dashboard](http://signoz-signoz-0:8080/services/payment)
- [Example Failing Trace](http://signoz-signoz-0:8080/trace/4c4118c1af94bfd2601ec993a847096a)
